Hannibal Rising (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $27,669,725Details
International Box Office $52,913,586
Worldwide Box Office $80,583,311
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $24,317,170
Total $24,317,170
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,051,650 (47.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,003 opening theaters/3,003 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $48,100,274

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 9th, 2007 (Wide) by Weinstein Co.
Video Release: May 29th, 2007 by Weinstein Co./Genius
MPA Rating: R for strong grisly violent content and some language/sexual references.
Running Time: 117 minutes
Franchise: Hannibal Lecter
Plot point: Cannibalism, Faulty Memory, Food, Non-Chronological, Serial Killer
Social setting: World War II
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Time period setting: 1940s, 1950s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Weinstein Company, Dino De Laurentiis, Quinta Communications, Ingenious Film Partners
Production Countries: France, United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English, French, German, Russian
